settings.heading: RTO
settings.text: Are you looking for a reliable, experienced partner to look after your compliance and quality assurance requirements?
settings.content:
Look no further than CAQA’s Retainer Services. Our team of expert VET professionals can visit your premises and develop systems and strategies to ensure your RTO meets its compliance requirements.

At CAQA, we fully understand the intricacies of compliance within the VET sector. It's not just about ticking boxes; it's about ensuring your RTO delivers high-quality training that meets the rigorous standards set by the Australian Skills Quality Authority (ASQA). Our team takes the time to understand your specific training delivery methods, assessment practices, and student support systems. This in-depth analysis allows us to identify potential compliance gaps and areas for improvement.

settings.text: Our team of VET experts have extensive experience in the Vocational Education and Training (VET) sector. We know the challenges faced by RTOs, and we have the knowledge and experience to help you meet your compliance requirements.
settings.content:
When you partner with CAQA, you can expect an in-house team of experts to visit your premises and work directly with your staff to understand your requirements. Our professionals will analyse your current compliance situation and develop strategies and systems to ensure your RTO is meeting its obligations. We will identify areas for improvement and implement processes to help you meet your targets.
Our team will also provide ongoing support and advice. We’ll keep you up-to-date on changes to compliance requirements, and provide guidance and advice on how to stay compliant.
If you’d like to learn more about our Retainer Services, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. We’d be more than happy to discuss your requirements and develop a tailored solution to meet your needs.

settings.sub_text: Clauses 2.1 and 8.4 to 8.6 - Compliance and Reporting
settings.content:
Clause 2.1

The RTO ensures it complies with these Standards at all times, including where services are being delivered on its behalf. This applies to all operations of an RTO within its scope of registration.

Clause 8.4

The RTO provides an annual declaration on compliance with these Standards to the VET [vocational education and training] regulator and in particular whether it:
a) Currently meets the requirements of the Standards across all its scope of registration and has met the requirements of the Standards for all AQF [Australian Qualifications Framework] certification documentation it has issued in the previous 12 months
b) Has training and assessment strategies and practices in place that ensure that all current and prospective learners will be trained and assessed in accordance with the requirements of the Standards.

Clause 8.5

The RTO complies with Commonwealth, state and territory legislation and regulatory requirements relevant to its operations.

Clause 8.6

The RTO ensures its staff and clients are informed of any changes to legislative and regulatory requirements that affect the services delivered.
